role: Last Prime Minister of Iran under the Shah (1979); opposition leader in exile
bio: Appointed as Iran's last Prime Minister by [Mohammad Reza Shah Pahlavi](/people/mohammad-reza-shah-pahlavi) in January 1979 in a last-ditch effort to quell the revolution. A member of the [National Front](/orgs/national-front-iran), his acceptance of the position led to his expulsion from the party. He fled to France after the [revolution](/events/iranian-revolution-1979) and was assassinated by Iranian government agents in his home near Paris on 6 August 1991.
editorial_notes: Assassinated by Iranian agents in Paris, 1991.
